parameters.query:
-- ADAPT TO YOUR SCHEMA
-- Pull active employees with department + manager info
SELECT
  e.employee_id,
  e.full_name,
  e.email,
  e.department,
  COALESCE(e.sub_team, '') AS sub_team,
  e.title,
  e.hire_date,
  m.full_name AS manager_name,
  m.email AS manager_email
FROM employees e
LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.manager_id = m.employee_id
WHERE e.status = 'active'
ORDER BY e.department, e.full_name
